name: AI activity log (every motion event)
description: On every motion event from a camera, Gemini watches the clip and writes a structured one-line incident summary to Helix. Turns a noisy motion feed into a searchable activity timeline in Verkada Command — "show me everything that happened at the loading dock last night" goes from scrubbing 8 hours of footage to filtering a Helix event list.
summary: Motion webhook → Gemini analyze video (JSON) → Helix activity-log event
